commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens Policy plugin `policy.jsonc` validation so unsupported sections and rule keys report `policy/policy-jsonc-invalid`, with focused doctor tests and CLI policy docs updates.

PR surface: Source +379, Tests +165, Docs +2. Total +546 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the PR whitelist still allows `tools.settings` and `tools.entries`, while current docs, metadata, and evaluator paths define only `tools.requireMetadata` and tool posture rules. I did not run commands because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] There is a narrow mechanical blocker: align the strict tools policy allow-list with the documented/evaluated tool policy surface before maintainer acceptance of the compatibility change.
